notes: Aider's headless --print is single-shot. Aider's session model uses ONE session_id (proc-PID) — no handoff phase needed. Phases assert: (1) session born in ready with invariant 'no state_transition to waiting' over the session lifetime, (2) process_exited fires on the same session. Variants 2/3 (SIGKILL) require driver-level sigkill that aider's interactive driver does not currently expose.

text: Variant 1: session in ready within 1s; never enters waiting through end of recording
Variant 1: clean exit on the same session_id
